Home/Shipping & Delivery

Shipping & Delivery

Safe and comfortable delivery options for your new Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppy throughout the US and Canada.

Delivery Options

At Harris Heritage Cavaliers, we want to make sure your new puppy arrives safely and comfortably. We offer several delivery options to accommodate families across the United States and Canada.

In-Person Pickup

We always recommend picking up your puppy in person when possible. This gives you the opportunity to meet us, see our home, and bond with your new puppy from the very first moment. There is no additional cost for in-person pickup.

Flight Nanny Service

For families who cannot travel to us, we offer a professional in-cabin flight nanny service. Your puppy will travel in the cabin of the airplane with an experienced pet nanny who ensures they are safe, comfortable, and stress-free throughout the journey.

Airport Delivery Cost

$185 - $240 depending on your location. This covers the flight nanny's travel expenses and care of your puppy during transit.

Travel Comfort

Your puppy travels in an airline-approved carrier in the cabin — never in cargo. They are held, comforted, and cared for the entire flight.

How It Works

1

Reserve Your Puppy

Once you have selected your puppy and completed the adoption process, we will coordinate a delivery date.
2

Flight Coordination

We arrange the flight and assign a trusted flight nanny. You will receive the flight details in advance.
3

Airport Pickup

Meet your flight nanny and your new puppy at the airport. Your puppy arrives with all paperwork and a travel kit.
4

Welcome Home

Your puppy arrives healthy, happy, and ready to start their new life with your family!

What's Included With Delivery

  • Airline-approved travel carrier
  • Health certificate for travel
  • Comfort blanket with familiar scent
  • Food and water for the journey
  • All puppy documentation and records
  • Welcome kit with food sample and care guide

Service Area

We ship puppies throughout the United States and Canada. Flight nanny delivery is available to all major airports. If you are located in a remote area, we will work with you to find the most convenient airport.

Ready to Bring Your Puppy Home?

Contact us to discuss delivery options and schedule the arrival of your new Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppy.

Harris Heritage Cavaliers

Premium Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppies raised with love in a family home in the USA. Harris Heritage Cavaliers is dedicated to breeding healthy, happy puppies that fill every home with warmth and joy.
